Description 'Stamps &' clearly visible. Amount shows only 1 shilling 6 pence in the shilling/pence columns (pounds column blank) — interpreted as 0 pounds, 1 shilling, 6 pence; pounds left blank in transcription.

There is a smaller handwritten total near this section that reads '49/14/18' but its alignment and context are ambiguous (could be part of a longer ledger arithmetic). Pence shown as '18' is outside normal pence range — this indicates either transcription of a multiple-field subtotal or mis-alignment. I have placed the digits as read but confidence is low because '18' pence would normally roll into shillings. (Kept as read for traceability.)
Line 'E Jones - legacy ... Int 4' with amount reading clearly as 101 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence. The abbreviated text is legible; amount columns clear.
